final:
module dot_product (
    input [4:0] vector_a,
    input [4:0] vector_b,
    output [9:0] dot_product_out
);
    assign dot_product_out = vector_a[0]*vector_b[0] + 
                             vector_a[1]*vector_b[1] + 
                             vector_a[2]*vector_b[2] + 
                             vector_a[3]*vector_b[3] + 
                             vector_a[4]*vector_b[4];
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      dot_product_out <= 10'd0;
    end
  end

endmodule
